nasb.text: And it became known to all who were living in Jerusalem; so that in their own language that field was called Hakeldama, that is, Field of Blood.)

esv.text: And it became known to all the inhabitants of Jerusalem, so that the field was called in their own language Akeldama, that is, Field of Blood.)

cnv.text: 這事住在耶路撒冷的人全都知道，所以按當地的話，那塊地稱為亞革大馬，意思就是‘血田’。

ccb.text: 这消息很快传遍了耶路撒冷，当地人称那块田为“亚革大马”，就是“血田”的意思。

csbs.text: 所有住在耶路撒冷的人都知道了这件事，因此那块地按着他们的本地语言被称为“哈克达玛”——这意思是“血田”。
